name: Zucchini Soup (Hess)
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Small zucchini; cleaned & sliced thinly
recipeInstructions:
1. Set aside a few slices of zucchini for garnish.
2. Heat margarine in a heavy, deep skillet.
3. Add onion, garlic, remaining zucchini, and water to the skillet.
4. Cover and simmer gently for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally with a wooden spoon.
5. Remove from heat; add all remaining ingredients.
6. Mix well.
7. Transfer mixture to a blender or food processor fitted with a steel blade.
8. Blend for 30 seconds.
9. Serve hot or well chilled.
10. Garnish each bowl with thin slices of zucchini.
Food Exchanges per serving: 1 VEGETABLE EXCHANGE plus 1 FAT EXCHANGE
CHO: 6g; PRO: 3g; FAT: 4g; CAL: 64 Low-sodium diets: Omit salt. Substitute unsalted chicken broth.
